Exercise 2: Write a program that sends “Push button pressed!” 
when you press the push button. 
 
Exercise 3: Write a program that counts how many times you 
press the push button. 
 
Exercise 4: Write a program that allows you to control the 
brightness of an LED via the serial terminal. 
 
Exercise 5: Write a program that makes a desired mathematical 
sent by the user in the format 
 “2+3=” or “2*3=” or “2-3=” or “6/2=” 
 
Exercise 6: Write a program that allows you to control the relay 
using a push button: the relay should be switched on 
when the button is pressed once, and switched off if 
the button is pressed again. It shall also tell the user 
when the Relay is switched ON or switched OFF. 
Exercise 7: How to simulate a traffic light using an Arduino Uno? 
 Draw the circuit diagram, and write the code.
